description_long: This object is a tall, rectangular filing cabinet with a sleek, modern design. The cabinet features a single, continuous vertical body with a slightly protruding top section, which appears to serve as the main compartment or drawer. The exterior is finished in a smooth, metallic gray, giving it a professional and durable appearance. There are no visible handles, label holders, or locks, suggesting a minimalist style, possibly with a push-to-open mechanism. The cabinet's proportions are narrow and tall, making it suitable for placement in tight office or urban spaces. Its sturdy construction implies it can support objects on its flat top surface.
description: A tall, metallic gray filing cabinet with a minimalist, handle-less design and a slightly protruding top compartment. Its smooth, modern finish makes it suitable for professional environments.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tall, rectangular body with a prominent top section and no visible handles or features.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the cabinet's depth and the overhanging top compartment, maintaining the same smooth, featureless surface.
description_view_2: Rear angled view highlights the uniformity of the cabinet's sides and the clean lines of the top section.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, emphasizing the cabinet's symmetry and minimalist design.
